description_long: This hamburger features a glossy black sesame seed bun on top, adorned with evenly distributed white sesame seeds. Beneath the top bun, there are visible layers of green lettuce, pale yellow cheese, and slices of red tomato, all stacked neatly. The bottom bun is slightly darker and thicker, providing a sturdy base for the fillings. The lettuce and cheese are cut into square shapes, with their corners protruding beyond the bun, giving the burger a visually striking, layered appearance. The tomato slices are centrally placed and add a vibrant contrast to the other ingredients. The overall look is stylized and bold, making it stand out in any urban food setting.
description: A stylized hamburger with a black sesame seed bun, layered with lettuce, cheese, and tomato. The toppings are neatly stacked and visually prominent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black sesame seed bun, with lettuce, cheese, and tomato layers clearly visible and protruding from the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the square-cut lettuce and cheese, with the tomato and bottom bun partially visible.
description_view_2: Another side view with a clear look at the lettuce and cheese layers, and the tomato slices peeking out beneath the bun.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bun, with the lettuce, cheese, and tomato layers still visible but less pronounced.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and cheese are layered directly beneath the top bun, with tomato slices below them and all toppings arranged in a neat, stacked order. The lettuce and cheese are cut into squares, with their corners extending beyond the bun's edge.
